title: Equipment & Capabilities
headline: World-Class Machinery. Micron-Level Precision.
intro: We invest in the best equipment available to deliver PET preform molds and blow molds that meet the highest standards of dimensional accuracy, surface finish, and production longevity.

categories.name: Quality Control Equipment
categories.description: Every PET preform mold undergoes rigorous dimensional verification using industry-leading metrology systems. Our QC lab is equipped with Zeiss coordinate measuring machines (CMM), high-resolution 3D profile scanners, optical comparators, and dedicated bottle sample inspection equipment — ensuring every mold core cavity and neck ring component conforms to specification before shipment.

images.alt: optical-comparator - Optical comparator for precision measurement

categories.name: Machining Equipment
categories.description: Our production floor is equipped with high-precision CNC machining centers, turning centers, and grinding machines sourced from the world's most trusted manufacturers. This equipment enables us to achieve the tight tolerances and superior surface finishes demanded by high-cavitation multi-cavity PET preform mold and blow mold production.

images.alt: mazak-cnc - Mazak multi-axis CNC machining center
jingdiao-engraving - Beijing Jingdiao high-speed engraving system
